title: stevia chamaedrys var. chamaedrys
intro: Stevia chamaedrys var. chamaedrys, also known as Stevia white or Mountain Stevia, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Stevia genus and is native to the mountainous regions of Mexico and Central America. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial and antiviral activity. The health benefits of Stevia chamaedrys var. chamaedrys include its potential to aid in weight management, improve digestion, and reduce the risk of heart disease. Stevia chamaedrys var. chamaedrys can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
